Here's the result of running `cat -n` on C:\Users\GIGABYTE\AppData\Local\Temp\FORGE_workspace_a540e066dcb94a49a20ba0e3cb87a424_yez3c2ny\app.py:
1	from flask import Flask, render_template, request, redirect, url_for, flash, session
2	from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy
3	from werkzeug.security import generate_password_hash, check_password_hash
4	from datetime import datetime
5	import os
6	
7	app = Flask(__name__)
8	app.config['SECRET_KEY'] = 'your-secret-key' # In a real app, use an environment variable
9	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///tasks.db'
10	app.config['SQLALCHEMY_TRACK_MODIFICATIONS'] = False
11	
12	db = SQLAlchemy(app)
13	
14	class User(db.Model):
15	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
16	    username = db.Column(db.String(80), unique=True, nullable=False)
17	    password = db.Column(db.String(120), nullable=False)
18	    tasks = db.relationship('Task', backref='owner', lazy=True)
19	
20	class Task(db.Model):
21	    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
22	    title = db.Column(db.String(200), nullable=False)
23	    description = db.Column(db.Text, nullable=True)
24	    priority = db.Column(db.String(20), default='Medium')
25	    due_date = db.Column(db.DateTime, nullable=True)
26	    is_done = db.Column(db.Boolean, default=False)
27	    user_id = db.Column(db.Integer, db.ForeignKey('user.id'), nullable=False)
28	    created_at = db.Column(db.DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
29	
30	with app.app_context():
31	    db.create_all()
32	
33	@app.route('/')
34	def index():
35	    if 'user_id' not in session:
36	        return redirect(url_for('login'))
37	    tasks = Task.query.filter_by(user_id=session['user_id']).order_by(Task.created_at.desc()).all()
38	    return render_template('index.html', tasks=tasks)
39	
40	@app.route('/register', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
41	def register():
42	    if request.method == 'POST':
43	        username = request.form.get('username')
44	        password = request.form.get('password')
45	        
46	        if User.query.filter_by(username=username).first():
47	            flash('Username already exists')
48	            return redirect(url_for('register'))
49	        
50	        new_user = User(username=username, password=generate_password_hash(password))
51	        db.session.add(new_user)
52	        db.session.commit()
53	        flash('Registration successful! Please log in.')
54	        return redirect(url_for('login'))
55	    return render_template('register.html')
56	
57	@app.route('/login', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
58	def login():
59	    if request.method == 'POST':
60	        username = request.form.get('username')
61	        password = request.form.get('password')
62	        user = User.query.filter_by(username=username).first()
63	        
64	        if user and check_password_hash(user.password, password):
65	            session['user_id'] = user.id
66	            session['username'] = user.username
67	            return redirect(url_for('index'))
68	        flash('Invalid username or password')
69	    return render_template('login.html')
70	
71	@app.route('/logout')
72	def logout():
73	    session.pop('user_id', None)
74	    session.pop('username', None)
75	    return redirect(url_for('login'))
76	
77	@app.route('/add_task', methods=['POST'])
78	def add_task():
79	    if 'user_id' not in session:
80	        return redirect(url_for('login'))
81	    
82	    title = request.form.get('title')
83	    description = request.form.get('description')
84	    priority = request.form.get('priority')
85	    due_date_str = request.form.get('due_date')
86	    
87	    due_date = None
88	    if due_date_str:
89	        due_date = datetime.strptime(due_date_str, '%Y-%m-%d')
90	        
91	    new_task = Task(
92	        title=title,
93	        description=description,
94	        priority=priority,
95	        due_date=due_date,
96	        user_id=session['user_id']
97	    )
98	    db.session.add(new_task)
99	    db.session.commit()
100	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
101	
102	@app.route('/toggle_task/<int:task_id>')
103	def toggle_task(task_id):
104	    if 'user_id' not in session:
105	        return redirect(url_for('login'))
106	    task = Task.query.get_or_404(task_id)
107	    if task.user_id == session['user_id']:
108	        task.is_done = not task.is_done
109	        db.session.commit()
110	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
111	
112	@app.route('/delete_task/<int:task_id>')
113	def delete_task(task_id):
114	    if 'user_id' not in session:
115	        return redirect(url_for('login'))
116	    task = Task.query.get_or_404(task_id)
117	    if task.user_id == session['user_id']:
118	        db.session.delete(task)
119	        db.session.commit()
120	    return redirect(url_for('index'))
121	
122	if __name__ == '__main__':
123	    app.run(debug=True)
